title: Session 23 — Goodbyes
bodyText:
# What happened
**[[pc-felson|Felson]] and [[cumb]] broke into [[filbert]]'s house** — a gold hoard and walls of motivational posters. **[[ms-judy]] sent a warning via self-destructing owl.** The Stonemason dwarves **marched on town** led by [[gilly]] and Ghruom — resolved with words, not blades; the party **deflected the patricide accusations** in a meeting with the dwarven leaders.

**The deal held: daylight returned to [[koviz]] — [[kennarea|Kennarea]] honoring her side now that [[root-darkpass|Root]] is gone.** Hope came back: warm breezes, light, life. **[[giuseppe|G]] — sick and bedridden — gave his final advice for finding [[the-pool|the pool]]: "Follow the water down. Follow the heaviest stream."** The party said their goodbyes and set out down the underground river toward the source of everything.

> [!dm] Party on the descent: **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]] (Pal 6), Felson (Monk 6), [[pc-varen|Varen]] (Wiz 6), Cumb (Rogue 4)**. [[pc-brolin|Brolin]], [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]], and [[michael-myconid]] are NOT on the S24 roster — where did they stay, and why? Record it.
